mapper.select: SELECT ppp.id, ppp.product_name, ppp.product_model_number, ppp.color, ppp.cloth_paper_type_id, CONCAT(cpt.category, '.', cpt.type_name) as cloth_paper_type_name, ppp.compatibility_status, ppp.paper_type, ppp.notice_ids, ppp.created_at, ppp.updated_at FROM post_processing_print ppp LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON ppp.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id ORDER BY ppp.product_name, ppp.product_model_number

SELECT ppp.id, ppp.product_name, ppp.product_model_number, ppp.color, ppp.cloth_paper_type_id, CONCAT(cpt.category, '.', cpt.type_name) as cloth_paper_type_name, ppp.compatibility_status, ppp.paper_type, ppp.notice_ids, ppp.created_at, ppp.updated_at FROM post_processing_print ppp LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON ppp.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id ORDER BY ppp.product_name, ppp.product_model_number LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT ppp.id, ppp.product_name, ppp.product_model_number, ppp.color, ppp.cloth_paper_type_id, CONCAT(cpt.category, '.', cpt.type_name) as cloth_paper_type_name, ppp.compatibility_status, ppp.paper_type, ppp.notice_ids, ppp.created_at, ppp.updated_at FROM post_processing_print ppp LEFT JOIN cloth_paper_types cpt ON ppp.cloth_paper_type_id = cpt.id WHERE ppp.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_processing_print ( product_name, product_model_number, color, cloth_paper_type_id, compatibility_status, paper_type, notice_ids, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{productName}, #{productModelNumber}, #{color}, #{clothPaperTypeId}, #{compatibilityStatus}, #{paperType}, #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE post_processing_print SET product_name = #{productName}, product_model_number = #{productModelNumber}, color = #{color}, cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId}, compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, paper_type = #{paperType}, notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM post_processing_print WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post_processing_print WHERE product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%') ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number
SELECT * FROM post_processing_print WHERE product_model_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productModelNumber}, '%') ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number
SELECT * FROM post_processing_print WHERE color LIKE CONCAT('%', #{color}, '%') ORDER BY product_name, product_model_number
SELECT DISTINCT product_name FROM post_processing_print ORDER BY product_name
SELECT DISTINCT product_model_number FROM post_processing_print ORDER BY product_model_number
SELECT DISTINCT color FROM post_processing_print ORDER BY color

SELECT DISTINCT s.color FROM products p INNER JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id WHERE p.name = #{productName} AND p.model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND s.color IS NOT NULL AND s.color != '' ORDER BY s.color
SELECT DISTINCT s.color FROM products p INNER JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id WHERE p.name = #{productName} AND s.color IS NOT NULL AND s.color != '' ORDER BY s.color
SELECT DISTINCT s.color FROM products p INNER JOIN specifications s ON p.id = s.project_id WHERE p.model_number = #{productModelNumber} AND s.color IS NOT NULL AND s.color != '' ORDER BY s.color

SELECT * FROM post_processing_print WHERE product_name = #{productName}
AND (product_model_number = #{productModelNumber} OR (product_model_number IS NULL AND #{productModelNumber} = ''))
AND (product_model_number IS NULL OR product_model_number = '')
AND (color = #{color} OR (color IS NULL AND #{color} = ''))
AND (color IS NULL OR color = '')
AND cloth_paper_type_id = #{clothPaperTypeId}
AND (paper_type = #{paperType} OR (paper_type IS NULL AND #{paperType} = ''))
AND paper_type IS NULL
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE post_processing_print SET compatibility_status = #{compatibilityStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE post_processing_print SET notice_ids = #{noticeIds, typeHandler=com.it.yts_project.config.IntegerArrayTypeHandler}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
